title: Surack: Auburn racetrack project ‘dead’ after land deal falls through
description:
The founder of Fort Wayne-based Sweetwater Sound said plans for a new racetrack in Auburn have come to a halt after talks to purchase the land needed for the project ended.

title: Franciscan Alliance CEO to step down
description:

title: Indiana judge rejects challenge in lawsuit over AG Todd Rokita’s jet ski purchase
description:
